title: jupytermeow
description: Meow-style modal editing for every CodeMirror editor.

rcLines.title: rc lines
rcLines.description: Overrides for the bundled .jupytermeowrc, one binding per line — e.g. `nmap S <action>(documentsearch:start)` or `map <leader>rr <action>(notebook:run-cell)`. Only the lines you add matter; everything else keeps its bundled default.
